name: Gpi
short_description: Jump and jump to reach the goal.Play with one button.There are 5 stages and all mixed stages.Jump with timing in the direction that changes every 1 second.No thorns and no time limit, but it will be difficult to reach the goal.
detailed_description:
Jump and jump to reach the goal

Offline multiplayer up to 4 players

Play with one button

There are 5 stages and all mixed stages

Jump with timing in the direction that changes every 1 second

No thorns and no time limit, but it will be difficult to reach the goal
about_the_game:
Jump and jump to reach the goal

Offline multiplayer up to 4 players

Play with one button

There are 5 stages and all mixed stages

Jump with timing in the direction that changes every 1 second

No thorns and no time limit, but it will be difficult to reach the goal
